channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Construction near Karachi’s Hill Park stopped amid dispute over alleged NOC; MQM-P seeks investigation
item.description: The Karachi Mayor Murtaza Wahab has confirmed that all construction activity near Hill Park has been halted following public complaints and administrative action by the Karachi Metropolitan Corporatio...

item.title: St George Illawarra Dragons defeat Brisbane Broncos to end long losing run
item.description: The St George Illawarra Dragons have ended a prolonged period of poor form by defeating the Brisbane Broncos in a surprising upset. The win marks a significant turnaround for the Dragons, who have str...

item.title: Cargo theft increases amid AI-driven demand and evolving criminal tactics, raising consumer costs
item.description: A new report from The Canadian Press highlights a growing surge in cargo theft that is increasingly linked to rising demand for artificial intelligence-related goods and more sophisticated criminal ta...

item.title: Eat Right Society celebrates 10 years with school project, health support, and book launch in Abuja
item.description: Eat Right Society (ERS), one non-governmental organisation wey focus on children wellbeing, celebrate im 10th anniversary with meaningful activities for Abuja community. The event happen for LEA Prima...

item.title: India’s smokeless tobacco crisis: affordability, addiction and policy gaps
item.description: The article examines India’s widespread smokeless tobacco problem, highlighting how gutkha, khaini and zarda remain deeply embedded in everyday life despite known health risks. It notes that India has...

item.title: TVK and DMK object to Governor’s tribute to Thiruvalluvar image in saffron robe at Tamil Nadu event
item.description: A political controversy has erupted in Tamil Nadu after Governor Rajendra Arlekar paid tribute to a portrait of Tamil poet and philosopher Thiruvalluvar depicted in saffron attire during a Thiruvalluv...

item.title: Putin links remarks on Ukraine war ending to Russian battlefield gains
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin has clarified his recent comments suggesting that the war in Ukraine could be approaching its end, stating that the remarks were based on an assessment of Russian prog...

item.title: AIG Kanayo Uzuegbu of Nigeria Police Zone 9 Dies After Battle with Cancer
item.description: The Assistant Inspector-General of Police in charge of Zone 9 Headquarters in Umuahia, Kanayo Uzuegbu, has passed away after battling cancer. His death was announced by Abia State Governor, Alex Otti,...

item.title: Arteta calls for decisive action to build on Arsenal’s domestic success
item.description: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has called on his club’s leadership to make quick, smart, and bold decisions following their penalty shoot-out loss to Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League final. D...

item.title: Appeals Court Pressure Mounts Over Delayed Release of Trump Classified Documents Report
item.description: Former U.S. Attorney Joyce Vance has suggested that legal pressure is intensifying around former President Donald Trump in connection with the classified documents investigation. The focus of the disp...

item.title: How Turkey Became a Global Leader in Hair Transplant Innovation and Medical Tourism
item.description: The article explores how Turkey became the world’s leading hub for hair transplants through a combination of medical innovation, engineering adaptation, and evolving industry dynamics. What began in t...

item.title: Expert Tips for Maintaining a Healthy Lawn During Summer Heat and Dry Conditions
item.description: This article provides practical advice for homeowners looking to keep their lawns healthy throughout the summer months. With warmer temperatures, increased evaporation, and the possibility of dry weat...

item.title: Veteran Bongo musician Zay B dies in Dar es Salaam, fans and artists pay tribute
item.description: Veteran Tanzanian Bongo music pioneer Zay B, whose real name is Zainab Lipangalile, has passed away, leaving behind a strong legacy in East Africa’s music scene. She died on Sunday, 31 May 2026, in Da...

item.title: Ackermann urges Bulls to sharpen up ahead of URC semifinal clash with Glasgow Warriors
item.description: After a commanding 45-14 victory over Munster in Pretoria, Bulls head coach Johan Ackermann cautioned that his side will need to raise their standards significantly if they are to overcome Glasgow War...

item.title: Lee Hi Set to Hold Manila Concert in August 2026
item.description: South Korean singer Lee Hi is scheduled to return to Manila in August 2026, according to an entertainment report published by ABS-CBN News on May 31, 2026. The announcement marks another visit by the ...

item.title: Karachi residents call for end to prolonged unannounced power outages
item.description: Residents across multiple areas of Karachi have raised strong concerns over prolonged and unannounced load shedding as electricity outages continue to disrupt daily life. According to reports, several...

item.title: HIV Prevention Rollout in South Africa Risks Missing Mobile Working Men Driving Transmission
item.description: South Africa don receive the first batch of Lenacapavir, one long-acting HIV prevention injection wey person go take just twice a year, and studies show say e dey almost 100% effective. The rollout, w...

item.title: Charli XCX and George Daniel host intimate fan Q&A and DJ set in London
item.description: Charli XCX and George Daniel, drummer of The 1975 and her husband, hosted a surprise intimate fan event in London titled ‘In Conversation’, followed by a DJ afterparty. The gathering took place in Exm...

item.title: Authorities issue travel advisory for Babusar Top amid heavy snowfall and hazardous conditions
item.description: The district administration in Naran, Khyber Pakhtunkhwa has issued a fresh travel advisory for Babusar Top, urging tourists, travellers, and transport operators to exercise extreme caution due to ong...

item.title: Tanzania launches major solar panel manufacturing plant to boost industrial growth and exports
item.description: Tanzania has officially launched what is reported to be the largest solar panel manufacturing plant in Africa, marking a major step in the country’s industrialisation and renewable energy development ...
